topics.title: Algebra and Functions
examination_focus: Partial fractions with linear, repeated and quadratic factors
Complex numbers: Cartesian and polar forms
topics.typical_question_style: decompose rational function into partial fractions

topics.title: Sequences, Series and Proof
examination_focus: Summation of finite and infinite series
Binomial expansion for positive and rational indices
topics.typical_question_style: prove a statement using mathematical induction

topics.title: Matrices, Vectors and Transformations
examination_focus: Vector operations: dot and cross products
topics.typical_question_style: solve system of three equations using matrix method

topics.title: Differential Calculus
examination_focus: Applications: rates, maxima and minima, convexity
topics.typical_question_style: find stationary points and classify their nature

topics.title: Integral Calculus
examination_focus: Integration by substitution, parts and partial fractions
topics.typical_question_style: find area enclosed between curve and x-axis

topics.title: Statics and Dynamics
examination_focus: Equilibrium of particles and rigid bodies
Friction: limiting equilibrium and angle of friction
topics.typical_question_style: find resultant of coplanar force system

topics.title: Projectile and Circular Motion
examination_focus: Projectile: time of flight, range, maximum height
topics.typical_question_style: calculate maximum height and range of projectile

topics.title: Probability Distributions
topics.typical_question_style: calculate probability using normal distribution table
